mapper.select: SELECT P.PET_ID AS petId, P.MEMBER_ID AS memberId, P.ANIMAL_ID AS animalId, P.PET_NAME AS petName, P.BREED_NAME AS breedName, CASE WHEN P.GENDER = 'M' AND P.NEUTERED = 'N' THEN 'M' WHEN P.GENDER = 'F' AND P.NEUTERED = 'N' THEN 'F' WHEN P.GENDER = 'M' AND P.NEUTERED = 'Y' THEN 'NM' WHEN P.GENDER = 'F' AND P.NEUTERED = 'Y' THEN 'NF' ELSE P.GENDER END AS gender, TO_CHAR(P.BIRTH_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS birthDate, P.WEIGHT AS weight, P.PHOTO_URL AS photoUrl, P.REGISTRATION_NO AS registrationNo, A.ANIMAL_NAME AS animalName, (SELECT MIN(ANIMAL_ID) FROM ANIMAL_TYPE WHERE ANIMAL_NAME = P.BREED_NAME AND PARENT_ID = P.ANIMAL_ID) AS subAnimalId, (TO_NUMBER(TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYY')) - TO_NUMBER(TO_CHAR(P.BIRTH_DATE, 'YYYY'))) AS age FROM MEMBER_PET P JOIN ANIMAL_TYPE A ON P.ANIMAL_ID = A.ANIMAL_ID WHERE P.MEMBER_ID = #{memberId} AND P.STATUS = 'ACTIVE' ORDER BY P.IS_MAIN DESC, P.PET_ID ASC
